section.heading: Change in name of Chalmette National Historical Park

content.p: The area described in the Act of October 9, 1962 (76 Stat. 755), as the “Chalmette National Historical Park” is hereby redesignated as the Chalmette Unit of the Jean Lafitte National Historical Park and Preserve. Any references to the Chalmette National Historical Park shall be deemed to be references to said Chalmette Unit.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Act of October 9, 1962 (76 Stat. 755), referred to in text, is Pub. L. 87–759, Oct. 9, 1962, 76 Stat. 755. Section 5 of that Act, which related to the boundaries of the Park, is set out as a note under section 231a of this title.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2009—Pub. L. 111–11 substituted “Jean Lafitte National Historical Park and Preserve” for “Jean Lafitte National Historical Park”.
